tagline: Honest, Trustworthy & The Highest Quality Pool Service

hero.headline: Award-Winning Pool Care You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: For 19 years, Central New Jersey families have counted on Mystic Pool for honest service and crystal-clear results. Our certified technicians handle every detail so you can stop worrying and start swimming.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Central New Jersey Homeowners
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to major repairs, Mystic Pool has every service your pool needs under one roof. Two retail locations, certified technicians, and 19 years of experience behind every visit.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Complete weekly maintenance including chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Your pool stays clean, safe, and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Expert sales, installation, and repair of pool filters, heaters, pumps, and automation systems from top brands. Most repairs completed same-visit.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Professional seasonal opening and closing services including equipment startup, winterization, cover installation, and full system inspection to protect your investment.

cards.title: Water Testing & Chemistry
cards.description: Precise water testing and chemical balancing available in-store at both locations and on-site. Crystal-clear, healthy water that is gentle on skin and eyes.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced leak detection services to locate and diagnose leaks in pool structures, plumbing lines, and equipment before they cause costly damage to your property.

cards.title: Safety Cover Installation
cards.description: Authorized Merlin Industries dealer for new safety cover sales and installation, plus expert repair of existing covers to keep your family protected year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call us, visit either retail location, or fill out our form. We will provide an honest, no-pressure assessment and quote. No hidden fees, no surprises.

steps.title: Our Certified Team Gets to Work
steps.description: AST and CPO certified technicians arrive on schedule with the right equipment and expertise. We handle cleaning, chemistry, repairs, and everything in between.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. If something is not right, we come back and make it right. That is the Mystic Pool promise.

about.label: Why Central NJ Trusts Us
about.headline: Privately Owned Since 2007 — Your Neighbors, Not a Franchise
about.description: Mystic Pool was founded on a simple philosophy: be honest, be trustworthy, and deliver only the highest quality service. Nineteen years later, we are still privately owned and operated, still serving the same communities in Monmouth and Middlesex Counties. Our AST and CPO certified staff, industry affiliations with NSPF, APSP, and NESPA, and two retail locations in Old Bridge and Marlboro mean you are always working with people who know your pool and care about getting it right.

features.title: Award-Winning Service
features.description: Recognized as one of the best pool companies in Monmouth and Middlesex Counties. Our industry certifications and affiliations guarantee top-tier care.

features.title: Two Retail Locations
features.description: Visit us in Old Bridge or Marlboro for in-store water testing, chemical supplies, equipment, and expert advice from our knowledgeable staff.

features.title: Honest, No-Pressure Approach
features.description: We tell you what your pool actually needs, not what pads our invoice. Straightforward pricing and straightforward service since day one.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Tell us about yours and we will provide an honest quote with no hidden fees and no upsell pressure.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation on trust and quality for 19 years, and we stand behind every single job.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within one week. Call our Old Bridge or Marlboro location and we will find a time that works with your schedule right away.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Mystic Pool technician is AST and CPO certified. We also maintain memberships with NSPF, APSP, and NESPA to stay current on the latest industry standards and best practices.

faqs.question: Can I get my water tested at your store?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Bring a water sample to either our Old Bridge or Marlboro retail location and our staff will run a comprehensive test and walk you through exactly what your pool needs.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool openings and closings?
faqs.answer: Yes, seasonal openings and closings are one of our most popular services. We handle equipment startup or winterization, cover installation or removal, and a full system inspection every time.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Monmouth and Middlesex Counties including Old Bridge, Marlboro, Manalapan, Freehold, Colts Neck, Monroe Township, and surrounding Central New Jersey communities.

testimonials.name: Jon A.
testimonials.text: These guys are great. First time pool owner and Jen went above and beyond to make sure I was ok. She was friendly, professional, courteous, and compassionate. Highly recommend Mystic Pool.

testimonials.name: Gordon D.
testimonials.text: Mystic Pool is incredibly responsive, show up at the scheduled time for service, and make staff available via text, phone or email. They come with my highest recommendation.

testimonials.name: Julie F.
testimonials.text: After a month long struggle trying to get my pool chemicals right at other places, I decided to try Mystic Pools in Marlboro. Dan was great and had my pool blue and balanced in a day!
